reports.title: aaif-goose/goose
reports.summary: 一个开源可扩展的AI代理，不仅限于代码建议，还支持安装、执行、编辑和测试任何LLM模型。
reports.content: an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM

reports.title: addyosmani/agent-skills
reports.summary: 面向AI编码代理的生产级工程技能集。
reports.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

reports.title: VectifyAI/PageIndex

reports.content: PageIndex: Document Index for Vectorless, Reasoning-based RAG

reports.title: anthropics/financial-services
reports.summary: Anthropic提供的金融服务领域示例代码和最佳实践。

reports.title: docusealco/docuseal
reports.summary: 开源DocuSign替代方案，支持创建、填写和签署数字文档。
reports.content: Open source DocuSign alternative. Create, fill, and sign digital documents.

reports.title: Hmbown/DeepSeek-TUI
reports.summary: 为DeepSeek模型打造的终端编码代理，可在终端中运行。
reports.content: Coding agent for DeepSeek models that runs in your terminal

reports.title: InsForge/InsForge
reports.summary: 基于Postgres的后端平台，集成了认证、存储、计算、托管和AI网关，专为编码代理设计。
reports.content: InsForge is a Postgres-based backend with auth, storage, compute, hosting, and AI gateway. Built for coding agents.

reports.title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
reports.summary: 支持本地和云端LLM的深度研究工具，可在3090上达到约95%的SimpleQA准确率。
reports.content: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs.

reports.title: The Burning Man MOOP Map
